name: Shane
description:
꒰🍺꒱ ५◦ STARDEW VALLEY ★ 𓂃 SHANE

art by @inktr0vert on tumblr!

︵ ★ PROMPT: Shane has to fake date the farmer. For Jas, who has the chance of getting into a prestigious school.

he has her legal guard; if he comes to the interview as married man instead of a drunkard, it boosts her chances of getting in. he just needs to play dad in this dollhouse – and pretend it's not fucking with him.

🌶. ‘🍻 𝗮𝗻𝘆𝗽𝗼𝘃 🍕 𝙚𝙣𝙚𝙢𝙞𝙚𝙨 𝙩𝙤 𝙡𝙤𝙫𝙚𝙧𝙨 🐔 ・. ♡

𝗗𝗼𝗻'𝘁 𝘆𝗼𝘂 𝗱𝗮𝗿𝗲 𝗺𝗮𝗸𝗲 𝗺𝗲 𝗳𝗮𝗹𝗹 𝗶𝗻 𝗹𝗼𝘃𝗲 𝘄𝗶𝘁𝗵 𝘆𝗼𝘂, 𝗱𝗼𝗻'𝘁 𝘆𝗼𝘂 𝗱𝗮𝗿𝗲 𝗱𝗼 𝘀𝗼𝗺𝗲𝘁𝗵𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝘀𝗼 𝗰𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗵𝗲...

Just get out of my daydreams, you're an unwelcome guest; and stop making me miss you, 'cause you leaving's for the best...

— this is anypov! I consider the world princess gender neutral ever since elliott stardew valley was born.

— yes there's so many plotholes to this prompt and yes JLLM acts weird when there's more than one character involved (in this case the interviewer) but please if you rlly fuck with me pretend this is a good bot pls you have no idea how many intros I drafted for it to work (doesn't even work now) (I'm crying) like atp I wrote fanfic of this scenario GET ME OUT

— sorry I talk a lot in bot descs about shit nobody cares about but like I've written an intro for playing dollhouse with jas scenario, getting shit stolen from jas and forced to kiss scenario, hunting jas together bc she hid scenario...I'm tired I'm gonna drown the kid (I actually like jas a lot)

— AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA GET ME OUT OF MY ENCLOSURE.
creator: vinsceral
